artifact_classification: authoritative Step 14 Base Color interpretation; source RGB remains evidence only at declared owned pixels
decision: Preserve exact native RGB at deterministic source-owned mip-0 pixels and classify every other Base Color texel as authored continuation, dilation, or unused padding.

map.name: T_GIA_BloodAxeCairnstone_A005_BC
map.channels: RGB; alpha optional but must be opaque 255 and carries no gameplay meaning

source_owned_mask_rule.status: approved deterministic interpretation for future Step 15 execution
source_owned_mask_rule.paper_reference: per-channel median RGB of the outer eight-pixel panel border
source_owned_mask_rule.foreground_seed_predicate: max(abs(R-paper_R), abs(G-paper_G), abs(B-paper_B)) >= 24 OR (R-max(G,B) >= 18 AND R >= 50)
source_owned_mask_rule.geometry_restriction: intersect the predicate with the depth-tested raster coverage of the approved face owner, grown by one pixel only to retain antialias fringe
source_owned_mask_rule.small_component_rule: remove an 8-connected foreground component smaller than four pixels unless it lies within two pixels of a component at least 64 pixels in size
source_owned_mask_rule.component_owner: the rasterized approved C-001/C-002/C-003/C-004 face identity supplies the primary component label
source_owned_mask_rule.failure_policy: If the deterministic matte includes labels/grid/dimensions or excludes material source pixels, Step 15 blocks and requires a separately approved rule revision; do not hand-correct the mask.
source_owned_mask_rule.review_required: native-resolution mask/source comparison for all five owner views before map acceptance

exact_rgb_transfer_rule.source_to_atlas: atlas_rgb[x+offset_x,y+offset_y] = panel_rgb[x,y] for every mask-owned source pixel
exact_rgb_transfer_rule.required_audit: every owned atlas mip-0 RGB triplet equals its declared source-panel RGB triplet byte-for-byte

authored_continuation.visible_transition_palette: derive an eight-color deterministic RGB k-medoid palette from the same component's owned, non-red stone texels; seed 0; lexicographic tie break
authored_continuation.placement: hand-painted low-frequency stone variation constrained to that palette family; placement is authored and must be visibly reviewed
authored_continuation.hidden_contact_fill: component-local darkest non-red medoid, flat except for required dilation
authored_continuation.underside_fill: C-004 non-red darkest medoid; flat, undecorated, and without rubble continuation

decoration_routing.red_predicate: R-max(G,B) >= 18 AND R >= 50, intersected with the source-owned mask
